3366.name: The Kelp Abyss
3366.description: The frigid water temperature and heightened pressure are apparent in this kelp forest. The kelp stalks are thick and tangled, forming a dense jungle that seems to go on forever. Strange creatures lurk among the fronds, their eyes reflecting the dim light like tiny jewels in the darkness.

npcs.name: Barracuda
npcs.description: Its long, narrow body is covered in shimmering silver scales, and its pointed head is filled with sharp teeth. The barracuda is a fierce predator, using its speed and agility to catch smaller fish.

npcs.name: Electric blue fish
npcs.description: This fish has a sleek, streamlined body and vibrant blue scales. Its fins are long and flowing, trailing behind it like ribbons, and when it pauses in the water, they sway back and forth like the fronds of a delicate plant.

npcs.name: Sea urchin
npcs.description: A small, spiny creature that lives on the ocean floor. Its round body is covered in hard, shell-like plates that are covered in sharp, pointed

npcs.name: Tuna fish
npcs.description: The tuna has long, pointed fins and a forked tail that it uses to swim through the water with incredible agility. Its large eyes are set high on its head, giving it excellent vision to spot prey from a distance.

3368.name: Underwater Tunnel
3368.description: As you approach the glimmering light, the cave begins to widen, revealing a large cavern illuminated by bioluminescent algae clinging to the walls. Stalactites and stalagmites jut out from the ceiling and floor, creating an otherworldly landscape. Schools of small fish dart past you, their scales catching the light and reflecting back like tiny prisms.

npcs.name: School of fish
npcs.description: The fish swim effortlessly, their movements perfectly synchronized as they weave in and out of the group in a mesmerizing display.

3369.name: The Secret Grotto
3369.description: The cavern is a broad room with a high ceiling. There is a dazzling array of marine life. The walls themselves are adorned with all manner of coral and sponges, creating a kaleidoscope of shapes and hues. The atmosphere is electric, filled with the sights, sounds, and sensations of an underwater wonderland.

npcs.name: Elusive eel
npcs.description: It has a snakelike appearance, with a pointed head and a long, thin tail that tapers to a point. Its eyes are small and bead-like, set in deep sockets, and its mouth is filled with sharp, needle-like teeth.

3373.name: The Coral Garden
3373.description: The coral formations rise from the ocean floor, their shapes and sizes creating a maze of intricate patterns. The rocky structures are covered in a rainbow of hues, from deep purples to bright pinks and oranges. Small crevices and caves are scattered throughout, providing hiding places for unseen creatures.

npcs.name: King crab
npcs.description: It moves its eight legs with surprising grace for such a large creature. You can see the sharp spikes on its legs, and you know that those claws could easily snap a finger or a small bone.

3374.name: Rocky Ocean Floor
3374.description: Small plants cling to the rocky surface, providing shelter for tiny creatures that flit in and out of the nooks and crannies. The water around you is thick with particles, giving it a hazy quality that seems to distort everything in your view. The colors of the ocean floor are muted and ethereal, with shades of blue, green, and violet.

3375.name: The Coral Reef
3375.description: The reef is a maze of rocky outcroppings and twisting tunnels, filled with an endless variety of coral formations. The colors are intense and mesmerizing, ranging from brilliant greens and oranges to deep purples and blues. Some of the coral formations are unusual and exotic, with strange shapes and twisting spirals that defy description.

npcs.name: Reef shark
npcs.description: Its body is covered in a dark, mottled pattern that provides excellent camouflage against the reef. The shark's powerful tail propels it forward, while its sharp fins keep it maneuverable in the water.

3367.name: Aquatic Pass
3367.description: There is a large opening in the side of the rocky underwater cliff. The opening is wide enough for even very large sea creatures to pass through, and you can see a glow at the end of the tunnel. The jagged rocks surrounding the opening are covered in slimy green algae, and schools of small fish dart in and out of the shadows.

npcs.name: Octopus
npcs.description: A magnificent creature with long, slender arms and a bulbous head. Its body is covered in a network of suckers, which it uses to grip onto rocks and other surfaces as it moves through the water.

3370.name: Seagrass Sanctuary
3370.description: The water is calm and crystal clear, allowing you to see the white sand on the cavern floor. The water is also oddly warmer than the rest of the cavern. The gentle swaying of the seagrass and moderate current make a great habitat for seagrass feeders. There appear to be bubbles sporadically streaming in from the north. You have lost 858 experience.

npcs.name: Sea turtle
npcs.description: Its smooth, domed shell is a mottled pattern of greens and browns, providing a perfect camouflage among the swaying kelp forests and coral reefs. The turtle's movements are unhurried and deliberate.

3371.name: Rocky Ocean Floor
3371.description: The landscape is rocky and rugged, with deep crevices and ridges that run for miles. The water here is calm and clear, and you can see for a great distance in every direction. The silence is profound, except for the soft sound of water flowing through the crevices. The rock formations are covered in a thick layer of green algae.

3376.name: An Alcove
3376.description: In a quiet corner of the cavern, you find a small alcove hidden away behind a curtain of delicate coral. The illumination from glowing creatures passing by reveal the colorful fish and sea stars that cling to the walls. The cavern floor is covered in anemones, and you can see small crustaceans scurrying about.

npcs.name: Giant squid
npcs.description: Its long, slender body is covered in smooth, pale skin and is supported by eight powerful arms that are each lined with suckers and two longer tentacles that can extend up to twice the length of its body.

3372.name: Geothermal Venting
3372.description: Bubbling geothermal vents and steaming water make this a very warm room. The walls are coated in bright red and orange algae, and the heat creates a shimmering haze. The denizens of the geothermal vents can be seen darting in and out crevices. Despite the extreme conditions, there is still life thriving here in this hot room. It's a testament to the resilience of the creatures that call this underwater world their home.

npcs.name: Giant tube worm
npcs.description: Despite the hostile environment, the giant tube worm has adapted to this unique and extreme habitat, extracting energy from the chemicals found in the vent fluids and forming a crucial part of the ecosystem.

3365.name: The Kelp Forest
3365.description: Surrounded by towering stalks of kelp, the water is dark and murky. The leaves of the kelp sway gently in the current, casting eerie shadows in the dim light. The forest is teeming with life: schools of fish darting in and out of the kelp, crustaceans scuttling along the ocean floor, and occasional glimpses of larger predators lurking in the shadows.

npcs.name: Shoal of fish
npcs.description: They move as one, constantly adjusting their formation in response to their environment, creating a fluid and ever-changing pattern. It's as if they are one organism, alive and pulsating with energy.

3364.name: The Deep Blue
3364.description: The underwater landscape is a fascinating and diverse ecosystem, with an endless array of colors and textures. Corals and anemones sway in the gentle currents, providing homes for a myriad of sea creatures. It is a world of serene beauty and graceful movement. You can hear the constant chatter of the animals around you, creating a symphony of sound.

3363.name: The Open Sea
3363.description: Small schools of jellyfish drift lazily by, their long, delicate tendrils trailing behind them. Looking down, you can see that the seafloor drops off steeply, the colors of the ocean begin to fade into shades of blue and green. You can feel the rush of water passing over your skin as you swim, and you hear the sound of your own breath and the bubbles that escape from your mouth.

2368.name: Crypt of Erolos
2368.description: The walls are adorned with intricate carvings and statues of religious figures, depicting scenes of great sacrifice and devotion. Rows of stone sarcophagi line the walls, some adorned with ancient symbols or family crests. The room is dimly lit by glowing, bioluminescent algae that cling to the walls and floor, casting an eerie greenish-blue light throughout the chamber.

3362.name: The Open Sea
3362.description: The water is clear and bright, giving you a clear view of the vibrant marine life that thrives in this area. The sound of your movements is muffled by the water, but the swaying of the currents is ever-present, gently buffeting your body and urging you along.

2345.name: Smooth Stone Path
2345.description: You can see the occasional merfolk darting past, going about their daily business, but the path itself is peaceful and quiet, allowing you to appreciate the beauty of the underwater world around you. The further you go, the more the path seems to blend in with its surroundings, becoming one with the vibrant and colorful underwater ecosystem. Crom follows in from the south. Magi follows in from the south.

npcs.name: Sea turtle
npcs.description: Its smooth, domed shell is a mottled pattern of greens and browns, providing a perfect camouflage among the swaying kelp forests and coral reefs. The turtle's movements are unhurried and deliberate.

2346.name: Smooth Stone Crossing
2346.description: The stones along the path are meticulously laid and fit tightly together, creating a seamless surface that is easy to traverse. Along the edges, vibrant sea plants and colorful corals sway gently in the current, contributing to a serene and tranquil atmosphere. The path to the east leads to a towering structure of smooth stone. To the west, a stone path leads to the garrison, while a smaller trail winds northward. Crom follows in from the south. Magi follows in from the south.

npcs.name: Well-toned merman
npcs.description: A mixture of a built upper body and a scaled lower body make up a dashing young merman who appears to be approaching you.  Whether or not his glance is locked upon you or something behind you is still a question.

2357.name: Study
2357.description: The room is illuminated by the gentle glow of bioluminescent coral that adorn the walls, providing a soft and calming ambiance. The main feature of the study is a large desk made of teak wood. The perimeter of the room is lined with various things like sea sponge chairs, a table with what looks like maps, blueprints and manuscripts, a long couch for laying down, and a tall bookcase takes up most of the east wall. Secret Passage The stone walls are rough and jagged, nothing like any other part of the house. There are no indications of life on the path. The water is dark and frigid. The passage twists and turns, the floor tapers downward, leading ever deeper into the depths of the ocean.

2359.name: Secret Passage
2359.description: The stone corridor abruptly ends, giving way to a circular chamber. In the center of the chamber is a flickering portal, surrounded by strange runes etched into the stone floor. The portal itself appears to be made of swirling black and purple energy, and there is an eerie humming sound coming from it. Crom follows in from the west.

npcs.name: Eikatos
npcs.description: emanating from him, as if he is capable of great feats of magic and has a

2360.name: The Grand Foyer
2360.description: The walls are adorned with exquisite artwork, and the floors are covered in asthetic carpets made from rare sea plants. The mansion is comprised of multiple levels. The furnishings are luxurious and elegant, with comfortable seating areas upholstered in marine life infused fabrics and intricate details on every surface.

3384.name: The Majestic Gates of Erolos
3384.description: At the base of a massive glacier lies a set of imposing double gates. Each gate is crafted from thick, dark steel, and are wide enough to allow even the largest of sea creatures to pass through. The gates are flanked by two massive sculptures of merfolk. The sculptures are made from a vibrant, luminescent coral that bathes the area in a mystical glow, making the surrounding waters come alive with vibrant colors. The intricate details of the merfolk's flowing fins and scales are visible in the light.

3385.name: The Great Glacial Wall
3385.description: The glacial wall in front of you is a stunning sight, with shimmering blue ice reflecting the soft light of the bioluminescent creatures that float lazily around you. The ice formations are intricate and beautiful, with deep crevasses and jagged peaks that seem to go on forever. Despite being face to face with a wall of ice, the water isn't frigid.

3386.name: The Great Glacial Wall
3386.description: As you swim towards the massive glacial wall, you're struck by the sheer size of it. The ice is a deep, dark blue, almost as if it's glowing in the dim light of the underwater world. The surface is rough and uneven, with chunks of ice jutting out in all directions. Patches of seaweed line the floor and parts of the wall. Deep cracks and crevices are observed, evidence of the constant movement of the ice as it shifts and settles in the ocean.

3390.name: The Great Glacial Wall
3390.description: The surface of this towering wall of ice is covered in intricate patterns formed by the slow movement of the ocean currents. The ice seems to glow from within, radiating a cool blue light that illuminates the surrounding water. The ice extends high into the distance, its surface dotted with larger cracks and deep crevasses that hint at the immense pressure and age of the glacier. Despite its cold appearance, the water here is surprisingly comfortable, creating a peaceful and serene environment.

3391.name: The Great Glacial Wall
3391.description: The glacial surface is covered in mesmerizing, geometric patterns that seem to dance in the light of the bioluminescent creatures swimming around you. As you gaze up, you see the ice extend into the distance, towering above you in a majestic and almost intimidating display of nature's power. Deep crevasses and jagged peaks decorate the glacier's surface, evidence of the immense pressure and weight that the ice has endured over time.

3393.name: The Cityscape
3393.description: The city of Erolos rises up before you, a magnificent display of merfolk architecture. Sweeping arches, intricate patterns of shells and pearls, and colorful sea plants adorn every inch of the walls and walkways. The sound of the bustling streets reaches your ears, a cacophony of laughter, chatter, and the occasional melodic tune from street performers. The scent of saltwater and sea plants fills your nostrils, and the gentle currents of the ocean caress your skin.

3395.name: The Junior Academy of Erolos
3395.description: The sound of youthful chatter fills the air. The walls are adorned with intricate murals depicting scenes from merfolk history, while bookshelves lined with ancient tomes and magical artifacts stretch up towards the high ceiling. At the center of the room, a large, shimmering crystal illuminates the entire space with a soft, blue light. Students of all ages dart back and forth between classrooms, eagerly discussing the mysteries of the ocean and the secrets of the merfolk. The scent of old parchment and salty sea breeze creates an atmosphere that is both studious and refreshing.

3396.name: The Academy of Aquatic Arts
3396.description: The room is expansive, with high ceilings and walls made of polished stone. At the center of the room is a massive statue of a merfolk warrior, proudly brandishing a sword and shield. There are chandeliers of glowing shells hanging from the ceiling. The sound of faint murmurs and footsteps echo throughout the hall.

3397.name: The Great Hall
3397.description: A grand corridor that runs the length of the building. The hallway is wide and spacious, with smooth, polished stone walls. The floor is covered in intricate mosaics of colored tiles that depict scenes of merfolk history and mythology. The hallway is lined with alcoves and niches that house sculptures, paintings, and other works of art created by the students and faculty.

npcs.name: Academy guardian
npcs.description: The guard stands tall and vigilant, with broad shoulders and a muscular build. He wears a dark blue uniform that is adorned with golden trims, indicating his rank as a senior officer.

3398.name: The Great Hall
3398.description: Despite its grandeur, the Great Hallway has a warm and welcoming atmosphere, with plenty of bioluminescent light and comfortable seating areas where students can rest and socialize between classes. Some of the displayed artworks are realistic depictions of sea creatures, while others are abstract or surreal, reflecting the merfolk's unique perspective on the world.

npcs.name: Graceful female student
npcs.description: She has long, flowing hair the color of deep sea coral and bright, inquisitive eyes that seem to take in everything around her. She moves with

3399.name: The Great Hall
3399.description: The murals on the walls also become more intricate and fascinating. There are depictions of merfolk gods and goddesses, with flowing hair and shimmering scales, presiding over their undersea domains. There are also scenes of daily life, with merfolk going about their business, tending to their homes and gardens, and interacting with each other in all sorts of ways.

npcs.name: Distinguished professor
npcs.description: The professor at the academy is a distinguished merfolk with a wealth of knowledge and experience. The professor is wearing formal attire, consisting of a long robe made of a light, flowing material that shimmers in the water.

npcs.name: Male student
npcs.description: A tall and lean merman, with a chiseled physique that suggested he spent plenty of time swimming and training in the combat school. He has wavy black hair that is neatly styled.

3400.name: The Great Hall
3400.description: A majestic space that sets the tone for the rest of the academy. Its high vaulted ceilings are adorned with intricate sea creatures made of gold leaf. The walls are decorated with tapestries depicting ancient battles and legendary heroes of the merfolk. You can hear the distant murmur of students and teachers discussing topics ranging from magic to combat strategy.

npcs.name: Electric blue fish
npcs.description: This fish has a sleek, streamlined body and vibrant blue scales. Its fins are long and flowing, trailing behind it like ribbons, and when it pauses in the water, they sway back and forth like the fronds of a delicate plant.

3402.name: Marine Biology
3402.description: This classroom is a spacious, chamber with a high ceiling and walls made of polished stone. Rows of desks and chairs are arranged in a half circle formation facing a raised platform, where the instructor's lectern is located. There is a large piece of whale hide mounted to the wall behind the lectern. The hide is littered with diagrams and notes, all jotted down with some sort of dark fluid.

npcs.name: Professor Kaida
npcs.description: As a respected scholar of marine biology, she has a deep understanding of the intricacies of underwater ecosystems and the complex relationships between their inhabitants. She is patient and encouraging with her students.

3405.name: Sea Breeze Plaza
3405.description: The plaza is expansive, stretching out before you and offering plenty of space for people to mill about. The stones are perfectly fitted together and polished to a high shine. To either side of the plaza are small gardens, with colorful flowers and fragrant herbs growing in neat rows. The water is filled with the sweet scent of blossoms, which mixes with the enticing aroma of fresh seafood to create a unique and refreshing aroma.

3407.name: Marine Accents
3407.description: The walls are adorned with shelves and racks, all displaying a variety of items such as bracelets, necklaces, earrings, and decorative hairpins. The seaweed and coral based trinkets are carefully arranged by color and style, with shades of green and pink dominating the space. As you peruse the shop, the delicate fragrance of the sea fills your nostrils, reminding you of the ocean's beauty and vastness. Soft music plays in the background, adding to the peaceful and calming atmosphere of the shop.

npcs.name: Nerissa
npcs.description: Her long hair shimmers with hues of seafoam green and deep indigo, and she wears delicate pearl earrings that complement the trinkets in her shop.

3408.name: The Siren's Table
3408.description: The walls are lined with shelves and bins overflowing with fresh fish, colorful vegetables, and exotic spices from all corners of the sea. In the center of the room, a large table showcases a variety of prepared dishes, from vegetable stir- fry to platters of grilled seafood. The atmosphere is lively and bustling, with locals of all ages alike stopping in for a quick snack or a leisurely meal.

3409.name: The Grand Entrance
3409.description: The grandeur of the smooth stone road leading up to the entrance gives off a feeling of importance. The meticulous craftsmanship of the stones beneath you create a seamless surface to traverse. The path widens ahead and is lined with intricate carvings of sea creatures and designs, made of expensive materials. The door is made of polished white marble, intricately carved with sea creatures and intricate patterns. Above the door, a large, ornate stained- glass window depicts a majestic underwater scene, with schools of colorful fish and waving sea plants.

3410.name: Seabed Serenity
3410.description: Towering fronds of giant kelp create a dramatic backdrop, while delicate strands of sea lace and other types of underwater ferns add a touch of softness. Among the plants are clusters of vivid purple sea irises, bright pink sea hibiscus, and delicate white sea lilies. Intricate strands of purple sea lavender and deep blue sea orchids add a touch of elegance to this lush display.

3413.name: Servant's Quarters
3413.description: There are rows of bunk beds along the walls, made of soft sea sponge, with sheets made of shimmering fish scales. Each bunk has a small shelf and a drawer for personal belongings. In the center of the room, there is a large communal table surrounded by sturdy chairs where the servants can gather for meals or to play games during their free time.

npcs.name: Merman servant
npcs.description: He wears a simple loincloth made of woven kelp, and carries himself with an air of quiet confidence and competence. His webbed hands are

3414.name: Town Hall
3414.description: The structure is rectangular in shape and has several large windows on each of its sides. The windows are framed with intricately carved pillars, each of which depicts different sea creatures and plant life. The roof of the town hall is made of overlapping layers of large, iridescent blue scales that shimmer in the light, giving the building an otherworldly appearance. Two massive stone columns stand on either side of the large double doors. The columns are adorned with carvings of merfolk and other sea creatures, and are topped with large shells that emit a soft, iridescent light.

2333.name: Circular Stone Plaza
2333.description: The junction of the four paths is a vibrant and bustling crossroads in the heart of the city. The smooth stone paths intersect at a circular plaza, which is adorned with ornate sculptures of sea creatures and vibrant plants. The surrounding buildings are constructed from intricate stone carvings, and the walls are decorated with delicate patterns and colorful coral reefs. The bioluminescent crystals that line the walls illuminate the area with a gentle blue light, casting soft shadows on the ground and adding to the ambiance of the bustling underwater city. Crom follows in from the east.

3415.name: Reception Hall
3415.description: The main chamber is spacious with high ceilings and large windows that offer a stunning view of the surrounding underwater landscape. A large desk sits at the front of the room, where a merfolk attendant is stationed to greet visitors. The walls are adorned with various artifacts and paintings, depicting the history and culture of the merfolk. A large chandelier made of glowing crystals hangs from the ceiling, casting a warm and inviting light throughout the room. The overall effect is one of elegance and sophistication, befitting of the seat of government in this prosperous underwater city.

npcs.name: Well-toned merman
npcs.description: A mixture of a built upper body and a scaled lower body make up a dashing young merman who appears to be approaching you.  Whether or not his glance is locked upon you or something behind you is still a question.

2334.name: Smooth Stone Path
2334.description: The gentle sway of aquatic plants line the way forward. Small schools of fish dart in and out of the plants, adding to the playful atmosphere. The glow of bioluminescent creatures illuminates the path, casting eerie shadows on the walls of nearby buildings. Despite the hustle and bustle of the merfolk around you, there's a serene sense of tranquility in this place that feels like a welcome respite from the world you are accustomed to. Crom follows in from the north.

2336.name: Courtyard
2336.description: The heart of Erolos is a bustling courtyard, filled with the sounds of merfolk going about their daily business. The streets radiating out from the center are lined with shops, each displaying its wares in glittering arrays of pearls, shells, and other treasures of the sea. Performers entertain the crowds with music and dance, their movements as graceful as the currents themselves. At the center of the courtyard stands a series of statues, each depicting a different aspect of the sea and its inhabitants. Crom follows in from the north.

2337.name: Shimmering Sand Pathway
2337.description: The pathway is made of shimmering sand and is lined with glowing sea plants and intricate coral formations that seem to glow with a gentle blue light. The path gently curves, and you can hear the soft swishing of seaweed and the occasional click and hum of underwater creatures in the distance. Crom follows in from the east.

2338.name: Aquatic Crossroads
2338.description: Merfolk of all shapes and sizes dart to and fro, their fins and tails propelling them through the water with ease. The schools of fish seem to part magically as they swim past, weaving in and out of the crowds. A magnificant cathedral can be seen to the west. Children of all ages are flitting in and out of what appears to be a school to the south. The Institute of Naval Combat lies to the north. Crom follows in from the east.

npcs.name: Agoraxas
npcs.description: fluidity that belies his fierce and brutal nature in combat.

npcs.name: Chief Thanaritis
npcs.description: and his long, flowing hair is a dark green, like the seaweed. He wears a regal robe made of intricately woven seaweed and adorned with shimmering

2341.name: Bubbling Spring
2341.description: Encased within a massive, transparent air bubble, this space exists as an anomaly amidst the aquatic surroundings. At the heart of the bubble, a clear, bubbling spring wells up from the floor, its pristine waters reflecting the soft light that filters through the aquatic barrier. The spring's source, buried deep within the ocean floor, provides a steady flow of fresh water. The air within the bubble is fresh and invigorating, infused with the subtle scent of sea and the earthy aroma of wet pebbles. Crom follows in from the east. Magi follows in from the east.

2335.name: Smooth Stone Path
2335.description: The path is wide enough for several merfolk to swim side by side and is lined with glowing blue crystals that illuminate the way. The surrounding buildings are made of intricately carved stone and are adorned with colorful sea plants and corals. The sound of chattering merfolk echoes through the underwater streets, creating a lively and bustling atmosphere. Crom follows in from the north.

3417.name: Records Room
3417.description: The shelves are filled to the brim with neatly organized scrolls, parchment, and bound books, each one carefully labeled with a title and date. A soft glow emanates from the small sea urchin lamps perched on each shelf, providing just enough light to read by. The water is still and quiet, interrupted only by the occasional rustling of pages as a merfolk researcher searches for a specific record. The atmosphere is one of intellectual curiosity and academic pursuit.

2356.name: Library
2356.description: This room is lined with rows upon rows of bookshelves, stretching up to the ceiling. The shelves themselves are made of polished teak wood and are filled with books and scrolls of all shapes and sizes. The room is well-lit by glowing crystals embedded in the ceiling, casting an ethereal blue-green light over everything. In the center of the room is a large table made of polished clamshell, surrounded by comfortable chairs. Crom follows in from the north.

npcs.name: Chief Thanaritis
npcs.description: and his long, flowing hair is a dark green, like the seaweed. He wears a regal robe made of intricately woven seaweed and adorned with shimmering

npcs.name: Dugong
npcs.description: Wielding tusk-like incisors, a large herbivorous marine mammal has spotted you.  Large nostrils act like valves as the female

3383.name: Glacial Waters
3383.description: The occasional sound of ice cracking in the distance grabs your attention. This seems to be the perfect habitant for a dugong. Its wrinkled, gray skin blends perfectly with the icy surroundings, and it seems completely at ease in the frigid waters. The water is so clear that you can see the dugong's breath as it exhales, creating small bubbles that rise to the surface.

2358.name: Secret Passage
2358.description: The stone walls are rough and jagged, nothing like any other part of the house. There are no indications of life on the path. The water is dark and frigid. The passage twists and turns, the floor tapers downward, leading ever deeper into the depths of the ocean. Crom follows in from the west.

3387.name: A Dark and Cramped Passage
3387.description: The passage is narrow and claustrophobic, hastily dug out with uneven surfaces and jagged edges that scrape against your skin. You feel like you're squeezing through a tight tube, the water pressing in on all sides, leaving you little room to move.

3388.name: A Dark and Cramped Passage
3388.description: The walls are rough and unrefined, with no sign of proper stonework or structure. You can feel the sand and sediment of the ocean floor under your feet, and bits of debris float by you in the murky water. The passage twists and turns, and you can't see more than a few feet in front of you.

3389.name: A Dark and Cramped Passage
3389.description: The walls are rough and uneven, and you can see small crevices and pockets where sea creatures have made their homes. You can tell where the tunnel transitions from a somewhat organic crevice into a purposefully carved out tunnel.

3392.name: Glacial Tunnel
3392.description: The tunnel is a winding path that has been carved into the towering glacier. Smooth walls of shimmering ice surround the visitor, and the only sound that can be heard is the muffled echo of their movement. The ice walls are adorned with intricate patterns that seem to dance and swirl in the dim light that filters through the walls. The patterns on the walls glow with a soft, ethereal light.

npcs.name: Electric blue fish
npcs.description: This fish has a sleek, streamlined body and vibrant blue scales. Its fins are long and flowing, trailing behind it like ribbons, and when it pauses in the water, they sway back and forth like the fronds of a delicate plant.

3394.name: Abyssal Armory
3394.description: An impressive variety of suits of armor line the walls, ranging from the tiniest of shells for the smallest of merfolk, to massive suits crafted for the largest of creatures. The armors themselves are made of a variety of materials, from shimmering scales of fish and crustaceans to sturdy plates of coral and granite. Each piece is intricately detailed, with motifs of underwater creatures such as sharks, eels, and octopuses etched into the metal. Metal clanging against metal can be heard as a skilled craftsmen hammers away at new pieces.

2367.name: Grand Cathedral
2367.description: Smooth white marble walls rise up to the high vaulted ceiling, adorned with intricate carvings of underwater flora and fauna. Shafts of light from bioluminscent creatures filter through the tall, stained glass windows, casting a colorful mosaic of light across the polished marble floors. The water is heavy with the scent of saltwater and incense, as merfolk of all ages come to pay their respects and seek guidance from the gods.

3401.name: Academic Wing
3401.description: A spacious area where merfolk students can relax and socialize between classes. The walls are adorned with colorful murals depicting marine life and great battles of the past, while comfortable seating areas and tables made of polished coral provide plenty of space for students to chat, study, or even play games. A small kelp garden sits in one corner, providing a tranquil spot for merfolk to meditate or simply enjoy the peaceful surroundings.

3403.name: Ancient Alchemy
3403.description: The walls are lined with stone shelves of books and glass jars filled with various ingredients, such as herbs and animal parts. A long, stone table dominates the center of the room. There is a large mural on the wall, detailing the process of transmuting base metals into other metals. The water is thick with the scent of various chemicals, and the room is purposefully kept dimly lit to preserve the delicate nature of experiments.

npcs.name: Professor Valtor
npcs.description: to sparkle with excitement whenever he talks about alchemy. He has long, black hair that he tied back into a neat ponytail, and a small, well-kept beard.

3404.name: Advanced Runes and Glyphs
3404.description: The walls are covered with intricate symbols and ancient writings, giving the room a sense of mystique and intrigue. The center of the room is dominated by a large circular table, made of dark stone and carved with elaborate symbols. At the front of the classroom, there is a raised platform where the instructor's desk is located. Above the desk hangs a large tapestry depicting an ancient rune, which serves as a focal point for the room.

npcs.name: Professor Alaric
npcs.description: The professor is stern and serious individual, with an unyielding dedication to the craft of rune and glyph magic. They have short, cropped hair that is a deep shade of brown, and piercing blue eyes.

3406.name: Bank of Erolos
3406.description: An impressive structure of coral and marble is nestled among the colorful reefs. The entrance is guarded by a pair of sturdy iron doors, flanked by rows sea urchin lamps that illuminate the way. The inner walls are lined with rows of safety deposit boxes and gleaming piles of gold and jewels. The desks and counters of the bank are made of polished marble.

3411.name: Ballroom
3411.description: Towering pillars of smooth coral line the walls and cast a gentle glow throughout this grand and spacious room. Graceful columns of smooth stone rise up from the floor to support to domed ceiling. The floor is covered in shimmering white sand save for a large circular platform made of smooth polished marble. There are also a few tapestries depicting mythical sea creatures.

3412.name: Kitchen
3412.description: In the center of the room is a large island made of polished stone. The table contains a variety of fish and other sea creatures, which can be caught and cooked on the geothermal stovetop. Shelves line the walls, displaying an array of sea vegetables and fruits, along with various spices and herbs. The room is filled with the pleasant aroma of freshly cooked seafood and the sound of bubbling water, making it a cozy and an inviting space for anyone interested in the culinary arts.

npcs.name: Mermaid servant
npcs.description: Despite her subservient role, she carries herself with a regal air and is always impeccably groomed. She wears a simple, yet elegant tunic made of woven kelp and carries out her tasks with grace and efficiency.

3416.name: Assembly Room
3416.description: The high ceilings are adorned with intricate carvings and colorful sea plants. The room is spacious and open, with rows of stone benches arranged in a semi- circle facing a raised platform at the far end. The platform is large enough to accommodate several speakers or performers, and it is adorned with ornate seashell patterns that sparkle in the light filtering in from the windows along the sides of the room. Clearly this room facilities important discussions.

npcs.name: Well-toned merman
npcs.description: A mixture of a built upper body and a scaled lower body make up a dashing young merman who appears to be approaching you.  Whether or not his glance is locked upon you or something behind you is still a question.

2460.name: Artifact Storage
2460.description: The floors, walls and ceiling are made of polished marble. There are a few murals that are hung up on the walls. Despite the fading colors and blurred forms, the murals are still able to convey a sense of vibrant life and energy. There are stone shelves up against the wall. There is a also large glass cabinet in the center of the room. Magi follows in from the east.

2342.name: Smooth Stone Path
2342.description: The path is wide enough for several merfolk to swim side by side and is lined with glowing blue crystals that illuminate the way. The surrounding buildings are made of intricately carved stone and are adorned with colorful sea plants and corals. The sound of chattering merfolk echoes through the underwater streets, creating a lively and bustling atmosphere. Crom follows in from the west. Magi follows in from the west.

2343.name: Smooth Stone Path
2343.description: The gentle sway of aquatic plants line the way forward. Small schools of fish dart in and out of the plants, adding to the playful atmosphere. The glow of bioluminescent creatures illuminates the path, casting eerie shadows on the walls of nearby buildings. Despite the hustle and bustle of the merfolk around you, there's a serene sense of tranquility in this place that feels like a welcome respite from the world you are accustomed to. Crom follows in from the south. Magi follows in from the south.

3361.name: The Open Sea
3361.description: The vast expanse of open water stretches out before you, with no visible signs of land in any direction. The gentle sway of the waves rocks you back and forth. The water rises and falls with each passing swell. The water around you is clear and deep, and you can see schools of brightly colored fish darting through the water.

2402.name: The Corridor of Battle
2402.description: Broken weapons and shattered shields are scattered around the room, and the walls are marked with deep claw marks. The ground is slick with a thick, black fluid, evidence of a brutal fight. Burn marks on the walls suggest magical attacks were used as well. Crom follows in from the east. Magi follows in from the east.

3379.name: The Sea Horse Playground
3379.description: Playful sea horses display a burst of color and energy as they dart and chase each other through the water. They twirl around bits of coral and race through the sea grass, their vibrant colors a blur. The playful chatter of the sea horses fills the room, creating a joyous and carefree atmosphere. It's a reminder of the joy and exuberance of life in the ocean.

2353.name: Smooth Stone Crossing
2353.description: The stones along the path are meticulously laid and fit tightly together, creating a seamless surface that is easy to traverse. Along the edges, vibrant sea plants and colorful corals sway gently in the current, contributing to a serene and tranquil atmosphere. The path to the east leads to a towering structure of smooth stone. To the west, a stone path leads to the garrison, while a smaller trail winds northward. Crom follows in from the west.

2354.name: Smooth Stone Path
2354.description: You can see the occasional merfolk darting past, going about their daily business, but the path itself is peaceful and quiet, allowing you to appreciate the beauty of the underwater world around you. The further you go, the more the path seems to blend in with its surroundings, becoming one with the vibrant and colorful underwater ecosystem. Crom follows in from the north.

2405.name: Torture Chamber
2405.description: Various sizes of cages litter the floor, some are small enough to hold a single fish, while others are large enough to contain a creature the size of a shark. The larger cages have broken chains and locks, as if their captors were trying to contain something particularly dangerous. The rusted metal of the cages has corroded over time, leaving gaping holes and twisted bars that allow you to see inside. Crom follows in from the south. Magi follows in from the south.

3378.name: The Sea Grass Labyrinth
3378.description: This room is a labyrinth of tangled sea grass and twisting coral. Tiny, delicate sea horses dart in and out of the maze, their slender bodies perfectly adapted for weaving through the narrow passages. It's easy to get lost in the twists and turns, but the sight of the graceful sea horses is worth the confusion. You feel somewhat dizzy and confused.

3688.name: Bubbling Spring
3688.description: Encased within a massive, transparent air bubble, this space exists as an anomaly amidst the aquatic surroundings. At the heart of the bubble, a clear, bubbling spring wells up from the floor, its pristine waters reflecting the soft light that filters through the aquatic barrier. The spring's source, buried deep within the ocean floor, provides a steady flow of fresh water. The air within the bubble is fresh and invigorating, infused with the subtle scent of sea and the earthy aroma of wet pebbles. Crom follows in from the south.

3689.name: Study
3689.description: The room is illuminated by the gentle glow of bioluminescent coral that adorn the walls, providing a soft and calming ambiance. The main feature of the study is a large desk made of teak wood. The perimeter of the room is lined with various things like sea sponge chairs, a table with what looks like maps, blueprints and manuscripts, a long couch for laying down, and a tall bookcase takes up most of the east wall. Crom follows in from the west.

3690.name: Detention Row
3690.description: The high, arched ceilings allow for more cells. Rows of barred doors line the walls on this upper floor, each leading to a small, cramped cell. The prisoners inside can be heard whispering and muttering, their voices muffled by the thick stone walls. Crom follows in from the south. Magi follows in from the south.

3691.name: Coral Labyrinth
3691.description: Towering coral formations overshadow everything else in your view. The colors are a mix of bright pinks, purples, oranges, and yellows. The coral formations take on all sorts of shapes and sizes. Some are like twisted trees, with gnarled branches and roots that curl around each other. Others resemble delicate lace, with intricate patterns etched into their surfaces. Some of these coral walls are so thick that you can barely make out any openings or passages. Ganondwarf steps out of a vanishing portal.

3692.name: Narrow Corridor
3692.description: The passage ahead is barely wide enough for two merfolk to squeeze through side by side. The walls are jagged and rough, as if they were hastily carved out of the surrounding rock. Strange symbols and glyphs, etched in glowing blue, line the walls, almost as if they are leading you forward. Deep scratches and gouges engrave the solid stone walls, as if something powerful and enraged tried to force its way through. Crom follows in from the west. Magi follows in from the west.

3693.name: Narrow Corridor
3693.description: The water in this passage is murky and thick with sediment, making it difficult to see more than a few feet ahead. The walls are smooth and featureless, save for the occasional patch of barnacles or small clusters of anemones clinging to the surface. The only light comes from faint glimmers filtering down from above, casting a dim glow over the debris that has collected on the floor. Crom follows in from the west. Magi follows in from the west.

npcs.name: Daemonic bishop
npcs.description: his bony hands. The water around him crackles with dark energy, and his presence alone exudes a sense of malevolence and power.

3694.name: Narrow Corridor
3694.description: The walls of this narrow passage are slick with a sickly, greenish residue that seems to glow dimly in the dim light. The pungent smell of chemicals and decay wafts through the water, making it difficult to focus. As you approach the heavy metal door, you notice that it hangs crookedly on its hinges, as if it was blown off by an explosion. Crom follows in from the west. Magi follows in from the west.

npcs.name: Daemonic naiad
npcs.description: upon closer inspection, one can see that her skin is slick and slimy, like a serpent's scales. Her hair is also made of writhing serpents.

3695.name: Demonic Hibernation
3695.description: The water temperature is relatively warmer here. The walls and floor are covered in a thick layer of silt and algae, creating a soft and cushioned environment. The room is large and spacious, with several alcoves carved into the walls, each one containing a pile of rocks, shells, and seaweed that the demons have collected to create their nests. The room feels almost womb-like, providing a peaceful haven. Crom follows in from the south. Magi follows in from the south.

3696.name: Antechamber
3696.description: The architecture of this room is mostly intact, and the absence of any signs of struggle or decay is unsettling. It's as if the creatures that inhabit this realm have an unspoken agreement to avoid this space, leaving it untouched and preserved in its original state. The quietness is a stark contrast to the horrors of the rest of this forsaken temple. Crom follows in from the west. Magi follows in from the west.

3697.name: Hall of Trials
3697.description: The floor is littered with evidence of past battles; broken swords, shattered shields, and battered pieces of armor litter the floor. In the center of the room, there is a raised stone platform that looks like it has been used as a stage for many brutal fights. The platform was most likely used to indicate the perimeter of the fighting area. The daemonic Kraken issues a bloodcurdling cry of pain! Bloodreaver drains blood from the corpse of The daemonic Kraken! You have gained 8 alignment. The daemonic Kraken. (1/1) Bloodreaver drains blood from the corpse of The daemonic Kraken!

3380.name: The Icy Abyss
3380.description: In the corner of the cavern, there is a large hole in the icy floor that descends into darkness. The cold water envelops you as you approach the edge, chilling you to the bone. The bioluminescent creatures you relied on for sight seem to be purposefully avoiding this corner of the cavern. Every so often you spot a bubble or two rise out of the frigid depths.

2370.name: Stone Passage
2370.description: The walls are slick with seaweed and the occasional bioluminescent organism, and the floor is covered in a thin layer of sand and sediment. Every step feels heavy and labored as the weight of the water above presses down, creating an ominous atmosphere of isolation and secrecy.

2371.name: Stone Passage
2371.description: The walls are made of ancient stone, slick with moss and seaweed, and the floor is very uneven, with jagged rocks and loose debris. This passage was not designed for comfort. The water grows colder, and the darkness becomes more intenser with every passing moment.

2372.name: Stone Passage
2372.description: The walls of the passage are made of crude weathered stone. Glowing growths jut out from between stones in various locations. The floor is rough and jagged enough to appreciate footwear. Other than the sporadic sprinkles of plant life, there don't appear to be any life forms.

2373.name: The Mysterious Cavern
2373.description: The domed ceiling is adorned with a mesmerizing mosaic of shimmering crystals and precious stones, forming patterns that seem to shift and dance in the dim light. Symbols and glyphs of varying sizes and shapes are meticulously carved into the walls and floor, creating a complex network of ancient magic. At the center of the room, a towering stone pillar rises from the floor, its surface covered in a myriad of engraved symbols and glyphs. The pillar is adorned with sparkling gemstones that seem to pulse with energy.

2383.name: Slimy Passage
2383.description: The walls of this passage are slick and slimy, covered in a thick layer of seaweed and barnacles. The floor is littered with the skeletal remains of small marine creatures, picked clean by scavengers. The occasional current ripples through the water, stirring up the debris and making it difficult to see. Crom follows in from the north. Magi follows in from the north.

2384.name: Slimy Passage
2384.description: The walls of this passage loom high above you, covered in a thick layer of slimy seaweed and sharp barnacles. You sink into the littered floor, composed of the skeletal remains of small marine creatures. The water is thick with the salty scent of the sea and the musty odor of decay. Crom follows in from the north. Magi follows in from the north.

2390.name: Torture Chamber
2390.description: Intricate machinery and devices make up a majority of this room. Most of them rusted or broken beyond repair. The walls are covered in diagrams and arcane symbols, etched in faded ink or carved into the stone itself. There is a large metal vat that appears to have once contained a potent potion or elixir. Crom follows in from the north. Magi follows in from the north.

npcs.name: Calantha
npcs.description: eyes shimmer with the same intensity. She moves with the grace of a dolphin,

2332.name: Landing
2332.description: A grand chandelier hangs from the center of the ceiling, casting a warm, inviting glow throughout the space. The chandelier is made of a combination of coral and crystals, forming a dazzling display of colors as the light filters through it. Several comfortable seating arrangements are scattered about the landing, providing a cozy spot to rest and admire the view. Crom follows in from the north.

2339.name: Aquatic Crossroads
2339.description: Merfolk of all shapes and sizes dart to and fro, their fins and tails propelling them through the water with ease. The schools of fish seem to part magically as they swim past, weaving in and out of the crowds. A magnificant cathedral can be seen to the west. Children of all ages are flitting in and out of what appears to be a school to the south. The Institute of Naval Combat lies to the north. Crom follows in from the northwest.

2340.name: Shimmering Sand Pathway
2340.description: The pathway is made of shimmering sand and is lined with glowing sea plants and intricate coral formations that seem to glow with a gentle blue light. The path gently curves, and you can hear the soft swishing of seaweed and the occasional click and hum of underwater creatures in the distance. Crom follows in from the west.

2344.name: Circular Stone Plaza
2344.description: The junction of the four paths is a vibrant and bustling crossroads in the heart of the city. The smooth stone paths intersect at a circular plaza, which is adorned with ornate sculptures of sea creatures and vibrant plants. The surrounding buildings are constructed from intricate stone carvings, and the walls are decorated with delicate patterns and colorful coral reefs. The bioluminescent crystals that line the walls illuminate the area with a gentle blue light, casting soft shadows on the ground and adding to the ambiance of the bustling underwater city. Crom follows in from the south. Magi follows in from the south.

2348.name: Central Hub
2348.description: The walls of the chamber are made of sturdy stone, and there are no windows to the outside world. Instead, magical orbs floating throughout the room provide a soft blue glow, illuminating the clean and polished surfaces. The centerpiece of the chamber is a massive statue of a trident-wielding merman, representing the power and authority of the Erolos army. Surrounding the statue are several stone pedestals, each displaying the names and achievements of the greatest military leaders in Erolos history. Crom follows in from the east. Magi follows in from the east.

2349.name: Central Hub
2349.description: The walls of the upper half of this centralized hub are adorned with intricate murals depicting underwater battle scenes and heroic acts of past commanders. The ceiling is dotted with glowing magical orbs that provide a soft blue light, casting shadows along the walls. The water is thick with the scent of salt water, and the sound of distant battle drills can be heard echoing through the corridors. Crom follows up from below. Magi follows up from below.

2350.name: Command Center
2350.description: Several magical orbs hover above, keeping this room well lit. The walls are adorned with maps and tactical plans, and a large table in the center of the room is covered with scrolls and parchment. At the head of the table sits the commander's chair, a large, ornate seat carved from solid stone. In front of the chair is a large, circular map of the city of Erolos and its surrounding areas. Several smaller desks and chairs are arranged around the room for officers and advisors to work at. Crom follows in from the west.

npcs.name: Chief Thanaritis
npcs.description: and his long, flowing hair is a dark green, like the seaweed. He wears a regal robe made of intricately woven seaweed and adorned with shimmering

2351.name: Central Hub
2351.description: The walls of the upper half of this centralized hub are adorned with intricate murals depicting underwater battle scenes and heroic acts of past commanders. The ceiling is dotted with glowing magical orbs that provide a soft blue light, casting shadows along the walls. The water is thick with the scent of salt water, and the sound of distant battle drills can be heard echoing through the corridors. Crom follows in from the east.

3377.name: Aquatic Meadow
3377.description: The sea floor is covered in a bed of soft sand, with scattered rocks and shells dotting the landscape. The gentle sway of the plants creates a tranquil environment, and the occasional gust of water ripples through the leaves like a soft breeze. The area is dimly lit, with only the faintest of glimmers penetrating the darkness, making it hard to distinguish any specific shapes.

2352.name: Central Hub
2352.description: The walls of the chamber are made of sturdy stone, and there are no windows to the outside world. Instead, magical orbs floating throughout the room provide a soft blue glow, illuminating the clean and polished surfaces. The centerpiece of the chamber is a massive statue of a trident-wielding merman, representing the power and authority of the Erolos army. Surrounding the statue are several stone pedestals, each displaying the names and achievements of the greatest military leaders in Erolos history. Crom follows down from above.

2355.name: Circular Stone Plaza
2355.description: The junction of the four paths is a vibrant and bustling crossroads in the heart of the city. The smooth stone paths intersect at a circular plaza, which is adorned with ornate sculptures of sea creatures and vibrant plants. The surrounding buildings are constructed from intricate stone carvings, and the walls are decorated with delicate patterns and colorful coral reefs. The bioluminescent crystals that line the walls illuminate the area with a gentle blue light, casting soft shadows on the ground and adding to the ambiance of the bustling underwater city. Crom follows in from the north.

2362.name: Detention Row
2362.description: Rows of small cells, with bars made of steel, line the walls on all sides. A section of what appear to be high security cells can be seen to the north. The low glow of magical orbs mounted on the walls provides minimal illumination. The sound of prisoners muttering to themselves and rattling the bars echoes through the narrow space. Crom follows in from the north.

npcs.name: Garrison prison guard
npcs.description: Fidal swings his sledgehammer into a garrison prison guard. The guard's broad shoulders and muscular frame speak to years of training and experience in combat. Their movements are precise and calculated, as if they are constantly assessing potential threats from the prisoners around them.

2366.name: Central Hub
2366.description: The walls of the chamber are made of sturdy stone, and there are no windows to the outside world. Instead, magical orbs floating throughout the room provide a soft blue glow, illuminating the clean and polished surfaces. The centerpiece of the chamber is a massive statue of a trident-wielding merman, representing the power and authority of the Erolos army. Surrounding the statue are several stone pedestals, each displaying the names and achievements of the greatest military leaders in Erolos history. Crom follows in from the north.

2363.name: Detention Row
2363.description: Rows of small cells, with bars made of steel, line the walls on all sides. A section of what appear to be high security cells can be seen to the north. The low glow of magical orbs mounted on the walls provides minimal illumination. The sound of prisoners muttering to themselves and rattling the bars echoes through the narrow space. Crom follows in from the south. Magi follows in from the south.

npcs.name: Tarek
npcs.description: face is sharp with high cheekbones and a defined jawline. He has piercing green eyes that seem to hold secrets and a serious, guarded expression.

2369.name: Stone Passage
2369.description: The only source of illumination is the faint glow of luminescent algae that grows along the walls, casting an eerie greenish-blue light that dances across the stone surface. The floor beneath your feet is slick with algae and feels slippery to the touch, making each step uncertain. The tunnel is eerily silent, with the only sound being the soft swish of water as it flows gently through the passageway.

2374.name: Coral Labyrinth
2374.description: Towering coral formations overshadow everything else in your view. The colors are a mix of bright pinks, purples, oranges, and yellows. The coral formations take on all sorts of shapes and sizes. Some are like twisted trees, with gnarled branches and roots that curl around each other. Others resemble delicate lace, with intricate patterns etched into their surfaces. Some of these coral walls are so thick that you can barely make out any openings or passages. Crom follows up from below. Magi follows up from below. Magi chokes and sputters, drowning.

npcs.name: Daemonic eel
npcs.description: Its eyes gleam with a red glow, and its razor-sharp teeth are visible even when its mouth is closed.

2375.name: Coral Labyrinth
2375.description: Towering coral formations overshadow everything else in your view. The colors are a mix of bright pinks, purples, oranges, and yellows. The coral formations take on all sorts of shapes and sizes. Some are like twisted trees, with gnarled branches and roots that curl around each other. Others resemble delicate lace, with intricate patterns etched into their surfaces. A narrow hole in the coral formation catches your attention to the southeast. Crom follows up from below. Magi follows up from below.

2376.name: Coral Labyrinth
2376.description: Towering coral formations overshadow everything else in your view. The colors are a mix of bright pinks, purples, oranges, and yellows. The coral formations take on all sorts of shapes and sizes. Some are like twisted trees, with gnarled branches and roots that curl around each other. Others resemble delicate lace, with intricate patterns etched into their surfaces. A narrow hole in the coral formation catches your attention to the southeast. Reminix lies down and goes to sleep.

2377.name: Crumbling Corridor
2377.description: The walls of this tunnel are crumbling in some places, with jagged stones and broken shells littering the ground. The water is thick with the stench of decay. Seaweed and kelp cling to the walls, snarled like the hair of a drowned mermaid. Bones lie scattered across the floor, some picked clean, others still fleshed and rotting. Crom follows in from out of nowhere. Magi follows in from out of nowhere. Fidal gets a potion from a sack he is carrying.

2378.name: Crumbling Corridor
2378.description: The walls of this tunnel are crumbling in some places, with jagged stones and broken shells littering the ground. The water is thick with the stench of decay. Seaweed and kelp cling to the walls, snarled like the hair of a drowned mermaid. Bones lie scattered across the floor, some picked clean, others still fleshed and rotting. An unruly wildfire engulfs the area, fierce flames dancing wildly around you. Ganondwarf shouts, "Heeeere kitty kitty kitty"

2379.name: Crumbling Corridor
2379.description: The tunnel is wide and spacious, but its grandeur has been long since forgotten. Cracks spiderweb across the walls, and mossy stalactites hang low enough to scratch one's head. The water is murky and cloudy, and it's difficult to see what lies ahead. Shadows dance and flicker on the walls, and strange sounds echo through the passageway. Crom follows in from the west. Magi follows in from the west.

2380.name: Crumbling Corridor
2380.description: This long hallway has intricate mosaics lining the walls, depicting ancient merfolk legends. However, many of the tiles are cracked or missing, and patches of seaweed and barnacles obscure parts of the artwork. Faint undistinguishable sounds can be heard in the distance. Dark, twisting roots emerge from cracked stone, pulsing with unsettling energy. Crom follows in from the west. Magi follows in from the west. Fidal just turns aside a daemonic bishop's brutal attack with his shield! Launching himself like a coiled spring, Fidal lands a glancing blow on a daemonic bishop.

npcs.name: Daemonic bishop
npcs.description: his bony hands. The water around him crackles with dark energy, and his presence alone exudes a sense of malevolence and power.

2381.name: Crumbling Corridor
2381.description: Towering stone pillars and massive statues loom in the distance. The debris on the floor seems to have once been part of the temple's grand architecture, with broken columns and archways jutting out at odd angles. Some of the broken statues depict the merfolk and tritons at different points in the war. Crom follows in from the west. Magi follows in from the west.

2382.name: Crumbling Corridor
2382.description: The ceiling of this hallway is high and vaulted, supported by tall stone columns that seem to disappear into the darkness above. The walls are lined with rows of empty alcoves, their purpose long forgotten. A thick layer of silt covers the floor, obscuring whatever lies beneath. Crom follows in from the west. Magi follows in from the west.

2385.name: Desolated Arcane Workshop
2385.description: The stench of decay disrupts your train of thought. The room is littered with debris, with rotten wooden shelves lining the walls. Broken glass, shattered jars, and unidentifiable debris float aimlessly around the room. The sound of water gently sloshing against the walls is punctuated by the occasional creak of a broken shelf. Crom follows in from the west. Magi follows in from the west.

2386.name: Desolated Arcane Workshop
2386.description: The room is illuminated by a soft blue glow emanating from several luminescent seaweeds clinging to the walls. The shelves are lined with hundreds of glass jars of varying shapes and sizes. Inside each jar is a preserved sea creature, from small fish to large squid and even a few giant crabs. Some of the jars are cracked or broken, with the creatures inside partially spilling out into the shelves, their skin wrinkled and distorted from the preserving fluid. Crom follows in from the north. Magi follows in from the north.

npcs.name: Daemonic succubus
npcs.description: energy or life force. It has dark, seductive eyes and a charming, hypnotic voice that can enthrall its prey.

2387.name: Desolated Arcane Workshop
2387.description: In the center of the room, a large metal table with rusted instruments still sits, though most of them have long since rusted beyond repair. The remains of some experiment still float around the table, with random guts and viscera adrift in the water, caught in the gentle current. Fragments of a fallen star are embedded in the surrounding stone. Crom follows in from the west. Magi follows in from the west.

2388.name: Narrow Corridor
2388.description: Visibility is minimal, with only a faint glow emanating from patches of bioluminescent fungi growing on the walls. Deep gouges and scratches deface the rough-hewn rock, evidence of a violent struggle. The water is thick with the smell of blood and decay, and small bits of torn flesh cling to the walls and floor. Crom follows in from the north. Magi follows in from the north.

2389.name: Narrow Corridor
2389.description: This narrow passage exhibits signs of a struggle. The walls are slick with a dark slime, and the stone floor is uneven and treacherous. In some places, the walls have collapsed, revealing gaping holes that lead to other chambers. Unidentifiable remains litter the edges of this passage, as if they were merely pushed aside. A shimmering lotus floats above the ground, its petals phasing between planes. Crom follows in from the west. Magi follows in from the west. Ganondwarf moves quickly to protect Magi from a daemonic imp! A daemonic imp swings at Ganondwarf in vain. Like a tiger, Ganondwarf swings his axe at a daemonic imp's arm.

2391.name: Narrow Corridor
2391.description: The passage ahead is barely wide enough for two merfolk to squeeze through side by side. The walls are jagged and rough, as if they were hastily carved out of the surrounding rock. Strange symbols and glyphs, etched in glowing blue, line the walls, almost as if they are leading you forward. Deep scratches and gouges engrave the solid stone walls, as if something powerful and enraged tried to force its way through. Crom follows in from the north. Magi follows in from the north. Reminix chants, "su daes im el ahim!" The air around Reminix sparkles.

2392.name: Narrow Corridor
2392.description: The passage ahead is barely wide enough for two merfolk to squeeze through side by side. The walls are jagged and rough, as if they were hastily carved out of the surrounding rock. Strange symbols and glyphs, etched in glowing blue, line the walls, almost as if they are leading you forward. Deep scratches and gouges engrave the solid stone walls, as if something powerful and enraged tried to force its way through. Crom sends a daemonic merman sorcerer sprawling with a powerful bash. Crom BRUTALLY beats a daemonic merman sorcerer to the ground with their scabbard! Crom brings his scabbard crashing down on a daemonic merman sorcerer.

npcs.name: Daemonic incubus
npcs.description: while they sleep. It has dark wings and glowing eyes, with a seductive and charismatic presence that can be both alluring and frightening.

2393.name: Narrow Corridor
2393.description: The metal door that used to gate entry to the southern chamber has been violently torn off its hinges, leaving deep gouges in the stone walls around it. The metal hinges themselves are twisted and mangled, as if they were subjected to extreme force. Crom follows in from the west. Magi follows in from the west.

npcs.name: Daemonic succubus
npcs.description: energy or life force. It has dark, seductive eyes and a charming, hypnotic voice that can enthrall its prey.

2394.name: Narrow Corridor
2394.description: The metal door that used to gate entry to the southern chamber has been violently torn off its hinges, leaving deep gouges in the stone walls around it. The metal hinges themselves are twisted and mangled, as if they were subjected to extreme force. Crom follows in from the south. Magi follows in from the south.

2395.name: Narrow Corridor
2395.description: The water in this passage is murky and thick with sediment, making it difficult to see more than a few feet ahead. The walls are smooth and featureless, save for the occasional patch of barnacles or small clusters of anemones clinging to the surface. The only light comes from faint glimmers filtering down from above, casting a dim glow over the debris that has collected on the floor. Crom follows in from the east. Magi follows in from the east. You are getting thirsty.

2396.name: Narrow Corridor
2396.description: The walls of this narrow passage are slick with a sickly, greenish residue that seems to glow dimly in the dim light. The pungent smell of chemicals and decay wafts through the water, making it difficult to focus. As you approach the heavy metal door, you notice that it hangs crookedly on its hinges, as if it was blown off by an explosion. An eagle-emblazoned totem pulses with a serene, mystical energy. Crom follows in from the south. Magi follows in from the south.

2398.name: Narrow Corridor
2398.description: The walls of this narrow passage are slick with a sickly, greenish residue that seems to glow dimly in the dim light. The pungent smell of chemicals and decay wafts through the water, making it difficult to focus. As you approach the heavy metal door, you notice that it hangs crookedly on its hinges, as if it was blown off by an explosion. Crom follows in from the south. Magi follows in from the south.

2399.name: Narrow Corridor
2399.description: The walls of this narrow corridor are slick and slimy, with veins of phosphorescent algae illuminating the way. The ceiling is low, and the passage is barely wide enough for one to pass through comfortably. The occasional skeletal remains of small marine creatures litter the ground, picked clean by scavengers.

2400.name: Narrow Corridor
2400.description: The walls of this narrow corridor are covered in a slick, black substance that seems to pulse and writhe as you pass by. It emits a low hum that seems to resonate deep within your bones, making you feel uneasy. The floor is uneven and slick, making it difficult to keep your footing. Crom follows in from the north. Magi follows in from the north.

2404.name: Narrow Corridor
2404.description: The metal door that used to gate entry to the southern chamber has been violently torn off its hinges, leaving deep gouges in the stone walls around it. The metal hinges themselves are twisted and mangled, as if they were subjected to extreme force. Crom follows in from the east. Magi follows in from the east.

2403.name: Overgrown Hallway
2403.description: The hallway is choked with dense foliage and overgrown vegetation that seems to have taken over the space. Vines and roots snarl across the ground, their tendrils creeping up the walls and wrapping around the ancient pillars that line the corridor. Crom follows in from the east. Magi follows in from the east.

npcs.name: Daemonic kappa
npcs.description: a turtle-like shell on its back. Its skin is slimy and green, and it has a patch of hair on its head resembling a bowl.

2406.name: Narrow Corridor
2406.description: This narrow passage exhibits signs of a struggle. The walls are slick with a dark slime, and the stone floor is uneven and treacherous. In some places, the walls have collapsed, revealing gaping holes that lead to other chambers. Unidentifiable remains litter the edges of this passage, as if they were merely pushed aside. Crom follows in from the east. Magi follows in from the east.

npcs.name: Daemonic imp
npcs.description: posture that gives it a mischievous appearance. Its skin is a deep shade of crimson, and its eyes glow with a malevolent light.

2407.name: Narrow Corridor
2407.description: Visibility is minimal, with only a faint glow emanating from patches of bioluminescent fungi growing on the walls. Deep gouges and scratches deface the rough-hewn rock, evidence of a violent struggle. The water is thick with the smell of blood and decay, and small bits of torn flesh cling to the walls and floor. Crom follows in from the east. Magi follows in from the east. Reminix chants, "bas rec je vohm je arum!" Reminix begins to glow with a bright light.

2408.name: Narrow Corridor
2408.description: This narrow passage exhibits signs of a struggle. The walls are slick with a dark slime, and the stone floor is uneven and treacherous. In some places, the walls have collapsed, revealing gaping holes that lead to other chambers. Unidentifiable remains litter the edges of this passage, as if they were merely pushed aside. Crom follows in from the west. Magi follows in from the west.

2409.name: Desolated Arcane Workshop
2409.description: In the center of the room, a large metal table with rusted instruments still sits, though most of them have long since rusted beyond repair. The remains of some experiment still float around the table, with random guts and viscera adrift in the water, caught in the gentle current. Fragments of a fallen star are embedded in the surrounding stone. Crom follows in from the south. Magi follows in from the south.

2410.name: Desolated Arcane Workshop
2410.description: This room is filled with broken vials and flasks. Strange plants and fungi growing in shattered pots, and the remnants of tools are scattered across the floor next to the overturned tables. The walls are lined with shelves with smashed containers, their contents resting haphazardly on the floor. Crom follows in from the south. Magi follows in from the south.

2411.name: Slimy Passage
2411.description: The walls of this passage loom high above you, covered in a thick layer of slimy seaweed and sharp barnacles. You sink into the littered floor, composed of the skeletal remains of small marine creatures. The water is thick with the salty scent of the sea and the musty odor of decay. Crom follows in from the east. Magi follows in from the east.

2412.name: Slimy Passage
2412.description: The walls of this passage are slick and slimy, covered in a thick layer of seaweed and barnacles. The floor is littered with the skeletal remains of small marine creatures, picked clean by scavengers. The occasional current ripples through the water, stirring up the debris and making it difficult to see. Crom follows in from the south. Magi follows in from the south.

2413.name: Crumbling Corridor
2413.description: The ceiling of this hallway is high and vaulted, supported by tall stone columns that seem to disappear into the darkness above. The walls are lined with rows of empty alcoves, their purpose long forgotten. A thick layer of silt covers the floor, obscuring whatever lies beneath. Crom follows in from the south. Magi follows in from the south.

2414.name: Overgrown Corridor
2414.description: Thick vines snake around the stone columns that line the room, their grip tight and unforgiving. The skeletal remains of a massive creature are partially obscured by the vines, as if the vegetation had entwined and immobilized the creature in its final moments. The bones are picked clean, revealing deep gouges and marks that suggest a violent struggle. Crom follows in from the south. Magi follows in from the south.

2415.name: Overgrown Corridor
2415.description: The overgrowth in this corridor is so thick that it almost seems to have a life of its own. Vines and seaweed twist and curl around pillars and stones, obscuring any carved patterns or engravings that may have once adorned the walls. The floor is covered in moss and lichen. Crom follows in from the west. Magi follows in from the west.

2416.name: Overgrown Corridor
2416.description: Thick vines snake around the stone columns that line the room, their grip tight and unforgiving. The skeletal remains of a massive creature are partially obscured by the vines, as if the vegetation had entwined and immobilized the creature in its final moments. The bones are picked clean, revealing deep gouges and marks that suggest a violent struggle. Crom follows in from the east. Magi follows in from the east.

2417.name: Overgrown Corridor
2417.description: The narrow corridor ahead is almost entirely obscured by a thick layer of green vines and moss, which seem to have grown unchecked for decades. The stone walls are barely visible beneath the tangle of vegetation. A series of small alcoves are carved into the walls, each containing a weathered statue of a sea creature or an ancient figure. Deep blue mineral veins pulse faintly with color. Crom follows in from the west. Magi follows in from the west.

2418.name: Incubation Chamber
2418.description: The floor is littered with broken eggs and piles of sloughed off skin. The walls are slick with a viscous black substance. In the center of the room, there is a large, bubbling pool of what appears to be a thick, black tar. The room is hot, with steam bubbles rising from the pool and condensing on the walls and ceiling. In the corners of the room, you can see strange, twisted growths that appear to be feeding off the energy of the incubation pool. Crom follows in from the south. Magi follows in from the south.

npcs.name: Daemonic sprite
npcs.description: A small, impish creature with gnarled horns protruding from its forehead. It has small, bat-like wings that allow it to glide

2419.name: Overgrown Corridor
2419.description: The narrow corridor ahead is almost entirely obscured by a thick layer of green vines and moss, which seem to have grown unchecked for decades. The stone walls are barely visible beneath the tangle of vegetation. A series of small alcoves are carved into the walls, each containing a weathered statue of a sea creature or an ancient figure. Deep blue mineral veins pulse faintly with color. Crom follows in from the north. Magi follows in from the north.

2420.name: Overgrown Corridor
2420.description: The lush vines and tangled roots seem to have a life of their own, stretching and intertwining over every inch of the walls and ceiling. The underwater environment has caused moss and algae to grow in patches along the floor. The darkness is only broken by occasional bioluminescent fungi, casting an eerie green glow on the surrounding foliage. It's as if the jungle has taken over this once orderly passageway, reclaiming it for its own. Crom follows in from the north. Magi follows in from the north. Magi chuckles.

npcs.name: Daemonic siren
npcs.description: serpentine tail with scales and fins. Her skin is pale and cold, and her eyes are a deep red that seem to glow in the dark.

2421.name: Trampled Corridor
