2421.description: The destruction that has taken place through this corridor is clear. The walls are scratched and chipped, and the floor is littered with rubble. The statues that once adorned the room are now shattered and in pieces, while the pillars that supported the ceiling are pulverized and lie in ruins. It's clear that a massive creature must have gone through here. Crom follows in from the south. Magi follows in from the south.

2422.name: Overgrown Corridor
2422.description: The once orderly stonework of the walls and ceiling is now obscured by a chaotic tangle of thick, thorny vines that seem to writhe and twist in the dim light. The water is thick with the scent of decay, as if the plants are thriving on the death that surrounds them. Crom follows in from the west. Magi follows in from the west.

2423.name: Overgrown Corridor
2423.description: The once orderly stonework of the walls and ceiling is now obscured by a chaotic tangle of thick, thorny vines that seem to writhe and twist in the dim light. The water is thick with the scent of decay, as if the plants are thriving on the death that surrounds them. Renzourin readies himself, eyes flashing with swift intent. Renzourin drains a daemonic bishop's life! Renzourin wounds a daemonic bishop with his blade. Renzourin moves like the wind, hitting a daemonic bishop twice! Renzourin drains a daemonic bishop's life! Renzourin jumps to the side and grazes a daemonic bishop with his blade.

2424.name: Overgrown Corridor
2424.description: The overgrown corridor is engulfed in a tangle of twisted vines and thorny brambles, their roots creeping and burrowing deep into the craggy walls. The walls of the corridor are covered in a thick layer of moss that glows with an eerie green light. Jagged, spiky leaves cast eerie shadows across the dimly lit passageway. Crom follows in from the west. Magi follows in from the west. Renzourin nods.

npcs.name: Daemonic behemoth
npcs.description: power. Its eyes glow with an ominous red light, reflecting its daemonic nature. The behemoth's maw is filled with razor-sharp teeth.

2425.name: Demonic Hibernation
2425.description: The water temperature is relatively warmer here. The walls and floor are covered in a thick layer of silt and algae, creating a soft and cushioned environment. The room is large and spacious, with several alcoves carved into the walls, each one containing a pile of rocks, shells, and seaweed that the demons have collected to create their nests. The room feels almost womb-like, providing a peaceful haven. The suddenness of the ejection catches you off guard, leaving you momentarily disoriented and struggling to regain your bearings.

2426.name: Overgrown Corridor
2426.description: The once orderly stonework of the walls and ceiling is now obscured by a chaotic tangle of thick, thorny vines that seem to writhe and twist in the dim light. The water is thick with the scent of decay, as if the plants are thriving on the death that surrounds them. Crom follows in from the east. Magi follows in from the east. Samu looks slightly better.

2427.name: Overgrown Corridor
2427.description: The walls are covered in thick strands of seaweed and kelp, creating a tangled web of green that sways back and forth with the ocean currents. The ceiling is so high it disappears into darkness, and the only sound is the gentle swishing of the plants in the water. Crom follows in from the west. Magi follows in from the west. Renzourin moves quickly to protect Neptune from a daemonic imp! A daemonic imp gasps as Renzourin dodges its claws. Renzourin drains a daemonic imp's life! Renzourin spits and swings his blade at a daemonic imp's leg.

2428.name: Chamber of Bones
2428.description: This eerie chamber is filled with the skeletal remains of both merfolk and demonic creatures. The bones have been arranged into strange patterns. Some of the bones have been fashioned into crude weapons and tools, as if someone was trying to fashion makeshift defenses against the demonic hordes. Crom follows in from the west. Magi follows in from the west.

2429.name: Overgrown Corridor
2429.description: The walls are covered in thick strands of seaweed and kelp, creating a tangled web of green that sways back and forth with the ocean currents. The ceiling is so high it disappears into darkness, and the only sound is the gentle swishing of the plants in the water. Crom follows in from the east. Magi follows in from the east.

2430.name: Collapsed Room
2430.description: The ceiling has collapsed in this room. The stones from the ceiling lay scattered across the floor, giving way to a twisted maze of sharp, broken rocks. The bones of unlucky adventurers float aimlessly, caught in the underwater current. There isn't much room to manuever.

2431.name: Broken Corridor
2431.description: The walls and floor are slick with a strange, slimy substance that seems to pulse with a sickly glow. Looking up, you see that the ceiling is collapsed in the southern portion of the room. You can see that something has carved a path through the solid stone to the west, leaving behind jagged, rough edges that suggest it was struggling to move forward. Ganondwarf gouges a daemonic merman sorcerer with his axe. A daemonic merman sorcerer looks to be in very bad shape.

npcs.name: Daemonic merman sorcerer
npcs.description: giving him a grotesque appearance. The sorcerer's power has been enhanced by the daemonic corruption that flows through his veins.

2432.name: Carved Passage
2432.description: Every inch of the walls seems to have been gouged out by some immense power, leaving a trail of destruction in its wake. Despite the rough and uneven surface, the corridor seems to be stable and secure, although the presence of this massive, destructive force is unsettling. Crom follows in from the east. Magi follows in from the east.

2433.name: Carved Passage
2433.description: Every inch of the walls seems to have been gouged out by some immense power, leaving a trail of destruction in its wake. Despite the rough and uneven surface, the corridor seems to be stable and secure, although the presence of this massive, destructive force is unsettling. Samu drains a daemonic succubus' life! Samu brings his blade down on a daemonic succubus.

2434.name: Carved Passage
2434.description: The walls of this corridor seem to have been carved out by some massive force, with jagged ridges and rough edges etched into the solid stone. The stone itself appears to be scarred and pitted, as if the force that carved it out had unleashed a powerful energy that burned and melted the rock. Crom follows in from the east. Magi follows in from the east.

npcs.name: Daemonic merman sorcerer
npcs.description: giving him a grotesque appearance. The sorcerer's power has been enhanced by the daemonic corruption that flows through his veins.

2435.name: Trampled Passage
2435.description: The walls and ceiling are covered in deep gouges and claw marks. The scratches are so deep that some have even exposed the rough stone beneath. The height of the gouges indicates that the creature responsible must have been massive, with a wingspan or limbs as wide as a full-grown tree. As you continue along the corridor, you notice that some sections of the wall have even been broken through entirely, as if the creature had no regard for the structural integrity of the temple. Crom follows in from the east. Magi follows in from the east.

2436.name: Trampled Corridor
2436.description: The destruction that has taken place through this corridor is clear. The walls are scratched and chipped, and the floor is littered with rubble. The statues that once adorned the room are now shattered and in pieces, while the pillars that supported the ceiling are pulverized and lie in ruins. It's clear that a massive creature must have gone through here. Crom follows in from the north. Magi follows in from the north.

2437.name: Overgrown Hallway
2437.description: The leaves of the plants are broad and waxy, casting the hall in a deep, verdant shade that feels almost claustrophobic. The water is thick with the smell of loam. It's clear that the hallway hasn't been tended to in years. There are indications that something may have pushed through the foliage recently. Crom follows in from the north. Magi follows in from the north.

2438.name: Overgrown Hallway
2438.description: The hallway is choked with dense foliage and overgrown vegetation that seems to have taken over the space. Vines and roots snarl across the ground, their tendrils creeping up the walls and wrapping around the ancient pillars that line the corridor. Crom follows in from the north. Magi follows in from the north.

2439.name: Antechamber
2439.description: The architecture of this room is mostly intact, and the absence of any signs of struggle or decay is unsettling. It's as if the creatures that inhabit this realm have an unspoken agreement to avoid this space, leaving it untouched and preserved in its original state. The quietness is a stark contrast to the horrors of the rest of this forsaken temple. Reminix chants, "bas rec je vohm je arum!" Magi begins to glow with a bright light.

npcs.name: Long, sinuous tentacle
npcs.description: distinctive texture. These bumps are a pale, almost translucent blue-green color, and they glint in the dim light of the underwater lair.

2440.name: Hall of Trials
2440.description: The floor is littered with evidence of past battles; broken swords, shattered shields, and battered pieces of armor litter the floor. In the center of the room, there is a raised stone platform that looks like it has been used as a stage for many brutal fights. The platform was most likely used to indicate the perimeter of the fighting area. Samu goes west. Reminix follows west. Neptune stealthily follows west. Fidal follows west. Renzourin follows west. Ganondwarf follows west. You follow Samu west. Hall of Trials This large chamber appears to be the hall for combat training. There are murals and paintings covering a majority of the walls. It's amazing that these pieces of art are still intact, despite the rest of the temple's current state. The mural in this room depicts a fierce battle between merfolk and tritons, both armed with spears and shields, engaged in a brutal arm-to-arm combat. Magi follows in from the east.

2441.name: Hall of Trials
2441.description: The walls are adorned with intricate mosaics made of seashell tiles, depicting various underwater creatures and scenes. One enormous vertical mural is displayed on the eastern wall. It is a stunning work of art, with a thick border made of glittering pearls and shells, and it stretches all the way to the bottom of the room.

2442.name: Storage Room
2442.description: This room appears to have the makings of a storage room, most likely for sparring equipment and other necessary tools. The shelves lining the walls are made of rough-hewn stone. In the far corner of the room, the remains of a merman lay curled in a heap.

2443.name: Hall of Trials
2443.description: This large chamber appears to be the hall for combat training. There are murals and paintings covering a majority of the walls. It's amazing that these pieces of art are still intact, despite the rest of the temple's current state. The mural in this room depicts a fierce battle between merfolk and tritons, both armed with spears and shields, engaged in a brutal arm-to-arm combat. Magi follows in from out of nowhere. Neptune shivers with cold!

2444.name: Overgrown Hallway
2444.description: The hallway is choked with dense foliage and overgrown vegetation that seems to have taken over the space. Vines and roots snarl across the ground, their tendrils creeping up the walls and wrapping around the ancient pillars that line the corridor. Magi follows in from the east.

2445.name: Overgrown Corridor
2445.description: Thick vines snake around the stone columns that line the room, their grip tight and unforgiving. The skeletal remains of a massive creature are partially obscured by the vines, as if the vegetation had entwined and immobilized the creature in its final moments. The bones are picked clean, revealing deep gouges and marks that suggest a violent struggle. Magi follows in from the east.

2446.name: Crumbling Corridor
2446.description: The ceiling of this hallway is high and vaulted, supported by tall stone columns that seem to disappear into the darkness above. The walls are lined with rows of empty alcoves, their purpose long forgotten. A thick layer of silt covers the floor, obscuring whatever lies beneath. Magi follows in from the north.

2447.name: Crumbling Corridor
2447.description: Towering stone pillars and massive statues loom in the distance. The debris on the floor seems to have once been part of the temple's grand architecture, with broken columns and archways jutting out at odd angles. Some of the broken statues depict the merfolk and tritons at different points in the war. Magi follows in from the east.

2448.name: Ritual Chamber
2448.description: A putrid smell assaults your senses. In the center of the room, there is an altar made of stone, upon which rests the skeletal remains of a merfolk. The bones are arranged in an unnatural pattern, and it seems as if the creature was torn apart with great force. The merfolk's remains tell a story of violence and horror. Maybe the legends about this temple aren't as accurate as it may seem. Magi follows in from the south.

2449.name: Crumbling Corridor
2449.description: The tunnel is wide and spacious, but its grandeur has been long since forgotten. Cracks spiderweb across the walls, and mossy stalactites hang low enough to scratch one's head. The water is murky and cloudy, and it's difficult to see what lies ahead. Shadows dance and flicker on the walls, and strange sounds echo through the passageway. Magi follows in from the east.

2450.name: Crumbling Corridor
2450.description: The tunnel is wide and spacious, but its grandeur has been long since forgotten. Cracks spiderweb across the walls, and mossy stalactites hang low enough to scratch one's head. The water is murky and cloudy, and it's difficult to see what lies ahead. Shadows dance and flicker on the walls, and strange sounds echo through the passageway. Magi follows in from the west.

2451.name: Crumbling Corridor
2451.description: Towering stone pillars and massive statues loom in the distance. The debris on the floor seems to have once been part of the temple's grand architecture, with broken columns and archways jutting out at odd angles. Some of the broken statues depict the merfolk and tritons at different points in the war. Magi follows in from the west.

2452.name: Crumbling Corridor
2452.description: The ceiling of this hallway is high and vaulted, supported by tall stone columns that seem to disappear into the darkness above. The walls are lined with rows of empty alcoves, their purpose long forgotten. A thick layer of silt covers the floor, obscuring whatever lies beneath. Magi follows in from the west.

2453.name: Overgrown Corridor
2453.description: Thick vines snake around the stone columns that line the room, their grip tight and unforgiving. The skeletal remains of a massive creature are partially obscured by the vines, as if the vegetation had entwined and immobilized the creature in its final moments. The bones are picked clean, revealing deep gouges and marks that suggest a violent struggle. Magi follows in from the south.

2397.name: Summoning Chamber
2397.description: It looks like an explosion has rocked the place, leaving everything in disarray. The walls are scorched black, and the ceiling is caved in, with debris and rubble littering the floor. Strange symbols and runes cover every inch of the walls, and in the center of the room lies a twisted mass of demonic and merfolk remains, fused together in a grotesque display of death. The water is thick with the smell of sulfur. Crom follows in from the north. Magi follows in from the north.

2455.name: Aged Pathway
2455.description: This room looks like it was once a grand corridor filled with mosaics and intricate carvings. But now, the mosaics are in shambles, with tiles missing and broken pieces scattered across the floor. The carvings on the walls are faded, chipped, and covered in grime. The once-beautiful artwork has been defaced, with cracks and claw marks. Indications of years of neglect and damage. Magi follows in from the south.

2456.name: Aged Pathway
2456.description: The corridor is lined with broken statues, their faces twisted in horror and agony. The walls are adorned with intricate mosaics, depicting battles between merfolk and the tritons, but many of the tiles are missing or shattered. The water is musty, with the smell of death hanging heavy in the atmosphere. Magi follows in from the east.

2457.name: Aged Pathway
2457.description: The walls are lined with algae and barnacles, and the floor is covered in a layer of sediment. Broken stone benches and rusted metal fixtures are scattered around the room, hinting at the former presence of merfolk scholars or guards. Bits of debris gently float into the room from the adjacent rooms. Magi follows in from the east.

2458.name: Hall of Artifacts
2458.description: There are a few tall stone shelves that reach up to the high ceiling. The shelves are intact but there are broken fragments of artifacts and shattered crystal shards floating around in the debris. The shelves appear to be built into the wall and thus weren't toppled over. This room was designed to store precious artifacts. Magi follows in from the east.

2459.name: Hall of Artifacts
2459.description: The walls are barren and scarred, with remnants of what may have once been murals or tapestries ripped and torn from the walls. A few tall stone shelves reach up to the top of the chamber, their contents long ago pillaged and scattered across the area. One of the upper shelves appears to have a gap between it and the lower shelf. Magi follows up from below.

2454.name: Trampled Passage
2454.description: The walls and ceiling are covered in deep gouges and claw marks. The scratches are so deep that some have even exposed the rough stone beneath. The height of the gouges indicates that the creature responsible must have been massive, with a wingspan or limbs as wide as a full-grown tree. As you continue along the corridor, you notice that some sections of the wall have even been broken through entirely, as if the creature had no regard for the structural integrity of the temple. Magi follows in from the south.

2401.name: The Corridor of Battle
2401.description: This room is littered with debris and broken furniture, evidence of a violent struggle that took place here long ago. Scorch marks mar the walls and floor, and the air is thick with the smell of burnt flesh. Weapons and armor, long rusted and decayed, are scattered about the room, and deep gouges in the stone suggest that some sort of monstrous creature was involved in the battle. In the center of the room lies a pile of bones, picked clean by scavengers. Crom follows in from the south. Magi follows in from the south.
